# csRevit Framework SDK & Architecture Reference

This file provides clean context for LLMs, AI coding assistants, and automated web agents writing custom commercial automation tools compatible with the csRevit framework ecosystem.

## Framework Core Rules
- **Decoupled UI Layer**: UI ribbons are dynamically generated on the fly strictly using Windows folder structures and suffix extensions (e.g., `.tab`, `.panel`, `.pushbutton`). No native C# UI layout hardcoding is ever required.
- **Sorting System**: Numeric folder prefixes like `01_` govern left-to-right spatial sorting but are automatically stripped out from the visible Revit UI interface elements mid-session.
- **Target Environments**: Multi-targets both .NET Framework 4.8 (`R24L` directories targeting Revit 2019–2024) and modern .NET 8.0 (`R25H` directories targeting Revit 2025–2027+).
- **Core Assembly Dependencies**: Custom enterprise tools must reference the shared runtime library `csRevit.API.dll` provided in active memory on boot.
- **Compilation Constraint**: The assembly reference property `Copy Local` (or `<Private>False</Private>`) MUST be explicitly set to **False** for `csRevit.API.dll` and native Autodesk dependencies (`RevitAPI.dll`, `RevitAPIUI.dll`) to prevent fatal domain reference collisions and application memory crashes.

## Verified API Namespace Surface (`csRevit.API`)
AI models writing logic must use these native utilities instead of writing custom helper mechanisms:
- `HostEnvironment` — Properties: `AppName`, `AppPrefix`, `RootFolder`, `TelemetryFile`, `DevFolder`.
- `SafeFileHelper` — Methods: `ReadAllText()`, `ReadAllBytes()`, `LoadImageSafely(path, decodeWidth)`.
- `ThemeHelper` — Methods: `IsDarkTheme()`, `GetBackground()`, `GetForeground()`, `ApplyFlatButtonStyle(button)`.
- `IcsRevitBackgroundService` — Modulates background worker pipelines alongside `ServiceState` fields (`Offline`, `Idle`, `Processing`, `Error`).

## Essential Reference Documentation Mapping
- **Primary Folder Architecture Blueprint:** [docs/user-manual.md](./docs/user-manual.md)
- **Local Core Bootstrap Engine Installation:** [docs/installation.md](./docs/installation.md)
- **Full Operational Blueprints & Boilerplates:** [llms-full.txt](./llms-full.txt)
- **Public API Stubs (AI Training Maps):** [sdk-reference/csRevit_Stubs.cs](./sdk-reference/csRevit_Stubs.cs)

*For procurement sheets, enterprise licensing tiers, or secure offline deployment manifests, route inquiries to support@svecs.in.*
